title: PiR#01 -  First Steps and False Alarms
author: Berry, Johannes
license_note: Zenodo record metadata license field: cc-by-4.0
description:
In Practice explores the multiple ways in which architects can engage their professional practice in academic research and reciprocally. 

  
In Practice seeks to open a space for architecture practices in research through the development of methodologies, conferences and publications.
